tech_news.title: Super Bomberman Collection update to add Super Bomberman: Panic Bomber W on August 20 - Gematsu
tech_news.description: Konami will release a free update for Super Bomberman Collection on August 20 that adds Super Bomberman: Panic Bomber W as a playable title, the company annonuced (2).

tech_news.title: Super Yanoman Collection announced for PS5, PS4, Switch, and PC - Gematsu
tech_news.description: Edia has announced Super Yanoman Collection for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC (Steam). It will launch on December 10 in Japan for 8,580 yen. A special edition will also be available …

tech_news.title: Pixel 11 Pro Fold leak shows off Google's classy Pine color and a sleeker camera design - Android Authority
tech_news.description: The Pixel 11 Pro Fold has leaked again, this time in Google's new "Pine" colorway, matching previously outed renders.

tech_news.title: Want to own a real T. rex? It could cost you $30 million - NPR
tech_news.description: The Tyrannosaurus rex fossil known as "Gus" will go up for auction on Tuesday. It's not the first time dinosaur bones have been sold to the highest bidder.

tech_news.title: Pokémon Go at 10 and the millions still trying to catch 'em all - BBC
tech_news.description: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.

tech_news.title: iPhone 18 Pro Release Date: Apple’s Strategic Choice Can Defeat Rivals - Forbes
tech_news.description: Apple’s September launch of the iPhone 18 Pro allows it to learn from its Android rivals. Samsung and Google will take the pain as Apple reaps the benefits.

tech_news.title: Phoebe Bridgers Launches Itch.io Page With An Infinite Runner - Kotaku
tech_news.description: The indie superstar breaks her hiatus with a RuneScape inspired single and a Subway Surfers style micro game

tech_news.title: Special Microsoft Flight Simulator controller is coming to Xbox - Notebookcheck
tech_news.description: So far, the Echo Aviation Controller has only been available for PC, where it supports Microsoft Flight Simulator and other titles. It can also be used on Mac for Laminar Research's X-Plane. A new model with console support is expected to follow soon.

tech_news.title: Obsidian Director Blasts People 'Running Their Mouths' About How the Studio Has Changed Following Xbox Layoffs - IGN
tech_news.description: Obsidian Entertainment director Brandon Adler is tired of seeing "cold take artists" who are "running their mouths" about the studio following recent Xbox layoffs.

tech_news.title: Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’ - The Verge
tech_news.description: Lorde says ‘fuck the glasses’ they’re ‘not sexy’ about festival sponsor Ray-Ban’s Meta AI smart glasses.
